case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JACQUELINE A. WESTBY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBY, JACQUELINE A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 56803075) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBY, JACQUELINE A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBY, JACQUELINE A. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-20-2013
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLT; DECL OF VENUE; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; AND CAUSE OF ACTION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED SEP-03-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBY, JACQUELINE A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $289.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $338.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WESTBY, JACQUELINE A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WESTBY, JACQUELINE A. $5,495.35 PRINCIPAL, $289.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,784.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
